title: jasminum cordifolium
intro: Jasminum cordifolium, also known as the Heart-leaf Jasmine, is a climbing shrub native to the tropical forests of Asia and Southeast Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Jasminum cordifolium include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and promoting wound healing, due to its flavonoids and saponins content. Jasminum cordifolium is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures to leverage its medicinal properties.
